meaning: n.高地,高原(上升后的)稳定水平(或时期、状态)
examples: We took a plane southwest across the Anatolian plateau to Cappadocia.
A broad valley opened up leading to a high, flat plateau of cultivated land.
The Qinghai-Xizang Plateau has long been known as the roof of the world.
Nameless waterfalls tumble down from the plateau above, while the shadows of clouds dance across treeless slopes.
On the Dixam plateau, the men huddled around the fire were of two minds.
